title: ハートビート・エキサイト

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out with Satono Diamond, she suddenly
stops in front of a huge poster.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"Are you brave enough to challenge Heaven, the
scariest roller coaster in history?!"

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of roller coaster it is! Perhaps
it goes really high... or is really fast...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: We have to go the amusement park!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Come on, Trainer. Let's get moving already. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look! Those tracks go so high up... That must
be the roller coaster they were talking about
being the scariest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So that's Heaven... It's certainly goes high enough
to live up to its name!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
That was wild... It seriously felt like I passed over
to the other side! I didn't expect that at all...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I'm never doing that again... I swear I saw my
great, great grandfather up there!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Looks like that roller coaster did a real number on
everyone who rode it! This is just...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So exciting! I'm sure it will be unlike anything I've
ever experienced. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Part of me wants to ride it, but the other part of
me is terrified. I flip-flop between the two
emotions...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What's the matter? Do you not want to ride it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: In that case... I'll just wait until you're ready. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to walk around the amusement park
for a while and have a relaxing time together.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That was delicious. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks like there's no line for the roller
coaster right now.
choice_data_list: You can ride it alone if you want.
You can ride it alone if you want.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I'll pass! I'm sure it would still be fun on
my own...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I don't think I'd be fully satisfied unless
someone else shared in the excitement with me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Now that I think about it, you and I sure have
gone out together a lot.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We're always exploring new worlds and making
discoveries...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We challenge ourselves with new experiences and
search for even more fun adventures...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, we've made nothing but wonderful
memories together. ...And I've realized
something.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy all the excitement so much more when
you're by my side!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So I'll wait as long as it takes. ♪ Until the time
comes when you're ready to share the excitement
with me!
choice_data_list: I still haven't built up the courage...
Why don't we search for another adventure?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's okay. I understand. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, with curfew quickly approaching, I
haven't managed to muster my resolve.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I guess it's time for us to head home!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure. You see, I'm the type who saves my
favorite food for last.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So let's share the excitement together some other
time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I vow to be brave when that day comes. All in the
hopes of bringing a smile to Satono Diamond's
face!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! I've been waiting to hear you say that! It's
time to ride!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clunk, clunk, clunk... Thwooooom!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: AHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing! I saw a beautiful field of
flowers!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder what we'd see if we rode up front!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We line up over and over until we get to ride in
the front car. It was a fun day, but I'm left feeling
mighty groggy...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I think that's a great idea! There are other rides
that I'm curious about trying too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The tea cups, the haunted house... Let's enjoy
everything we can before the park closes!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's go! First up is the haunted house!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "The scariest haunted house
ever—Hell"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and I have fun together even
without riding the roller coaster!
